sb_exclusion: record_subtype <> 'SB' (Amazon Sponsored Brands cannot be attributed to a specific ASIN/SKU)

credential_handling: No credentials are stored in this file or any implementation file. A production runtime reads connection details from environment variables at execution time (see src/db_connection.py header comment); this session generates report data via the pre-authorized PRIMARY_SKILLS_MCP tool connection, not a direct psycopg2 connection, since no local database credentials are available to this agent.
